entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH REMAINS IN EFFECT THROUGH SUNDAY MORNING

entry.data:
SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY THIS EVENING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL THIS EVENING
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL AFTER MIDNIGHT
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

CLEAR, HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
